prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次约1176→1117→897→3209→2879，2024年因新高考改革（理科→物理类）出现位次大幅后移，2025年略有回升至2879名，近两年基准位次 在2800–3200区间波动；该校在江西省物理类招生计划2021–2023年（理科）分别为60、60、49人，2024–2025年（物理类）分别为49、46人；2026年计划 增至57人，较2025年扩招约24%，竞争压力有所缓解，但扩招幅度较大，对位次有下移（数字增大）作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学 主榜2026年排名第12位（哈工大校本部排名，深圳校区共享），属全国顶尖高校梯队，对高分考生吸引力强；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第10位（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高；2024年曾出现投档线异常信号（考生反映招生宣传不足），但2025年已有所回升；依托哈尔滨工业大学学科体系，拥有力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程4个A+学科，以及计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、电气工程等A学科，工科实力全 国顶尖，对理科高分考生有显著吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业2024–2026年持续高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度匹配；江西省2026年普通高考总人数约474900人（较2025年约466480人略增），物理类考生估算约27万人，竞争基数扩大；哈尔 滨工业大学（深圳）位于深圳市，地处粤港澳大湾区核心城市，地域优势明显，对跨省考生吸引力强；该校在江西省招生计划占比较小（约50–60人），属于省外优质生源竞争。\ n综合2025年基准位次2879名、2026年大幅扩招约24%（计划46→57人）的竞争缓解效应、学校顶尖层次与高热声誉的持续吸引力、以及江西省考生总数小幅增长，M 3供需弹性主值计算为3292名；考虑深圳校区地域优势及工科热门专业热度，适度修正后预测2026年最低位次约3262名，区间2890–3634名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 1176 → 1117 → 897 → 3209 → 2879. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform (from Science to Physics Category), there was a significant drop in rankings, and in 2025, it slightly recovered to 2879. In recent two years, the baseline ranking fluctuates in the 2800–3200 range. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province for Physics Category was 60, 60, and 49 students from 2021 to 2023 (Science Category), and 49 and 46 students for 2024 and 2025 (Physics Category). In 2026, the plan increases to 57 students, an expansion of about 24% compared to 2025, which alleviates competition pressure to some extent, but the large expansion tends to lower the ranking (increase the number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks 12th (based on the main campus of HIT, shared by Shenzhen campus), belonging to the top tier of national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, its reputation is evaluated as neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranks 10th (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms, leading to high application attention. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (candidates reported insufficient enrollment promotion), but it recovered in 2025. Relying on the discipline system of Harbin Institute of Technology, it has 4 A+ disciplines: Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering, as well as A disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, and Electrical Engineering. Its engineering strength is top in the country, significantly attracting high-scoring science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text:
Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, highly matching the university's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Jiangxi Province is approximately 474,900 (slightly increased from about 466,480 in 2025), with an estimated 270,000 candidates in the Physics Category, expanding the competition base. Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is located in Shenzhen, a core city of the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, with obvious geographical advantages, strongly attracting cross-province candidates. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province is relatively small (about 50–60 students), making it a competition for high-quality out-of-province students.
Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 2879, the competition relief effect of a significant 24% expansion in 2026 (plan from 46 to 57 students), the sustained attraction of the university's top tier and high reputation, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province, the M3 supply-demand elasticity main value is calculated as 3292. Considering the geographical advantage of the Shenzhen campus and the popularity of engineering hot majors, after moderate correction, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3262, with a range of 2890–3634.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Energy Excellent Joint Training Class) (Materials Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Engineering Mechanics)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Excellent Joint Training Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future City Excellent Joint Training Class) (Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Chemistry, Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 3262, range 2890–3634. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2890), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer/AI categories). For rankings close to the upper limit of the range (>3634), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for this subject category was approximately 824 → 655 → 767, with small fluctuations over the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is about 767. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province for the History Category (Liberal Arts) was 6 students in 2023 (Liberal Arts), 6 students in 2024 (History Category), and 4 students in 2025 (History Category). The 2026 document does not include History Category plan data, so the rule falls back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, making it a top national university with strong brand appeal to high-scoring liberal arts students. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negatives. Its Douyin heat ranking is 10th overall (high heat), indicating high overall attention. No abnormal signals in History Category admissions have been observed. HIT is known for engineering, offering only a few liberal arts majors such as the Economics and Management Experimental Class and Architecture (Smart Human Settlement Class). In discipline evaluations, Business Administration is A, Management Science and Engineering is A, and Architecture is A-. Although liberal arts majors are few, they benefit from the university's overall brand.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics and management majors were in a state of differentiation and wait-and-see from 2024 to 2026, with moderate social popularity. The estimated number of History Category examinees in Jiangxi Province for 2026 is about 204,000 (a slight decrease of about 0.9% from 206,000 in 2025), so the competition base has slightly decreased. The Shenzhen campus is located in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, with strong urban appeal, which also adds regional preference for liberal arts students. The number of History Category enrollments is very small (4–6 students), making it an elite enrollment, and ranking fluctuations are greatly affected by individual high-scoring candidates' decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 767, stable enrollment plan, a slight decrease of about 0.9% in the total number of examinees, and sustained brand and regional appeal, considering the slight reduction in examinee base and the differentiation of liberal arts major popularity, after moderate correction, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 782, with a range of 693–871.
